parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely AI-generated. The characters exhibit uncanny facial features, unnatural skin textures, and poor lip-syncing that doesn't match the audio. Background characters are completely static and distorted, and the lighting has an artificial, overly sharp quality typical of AI video generation.

characters.appearance: Older male, medium build, light complexion. He has short dark hair with some graying and a prominent mustache. His facial features are slightly distorted, typical of AI generation.
characters.wardrobe: A solid black short-sleeved polo shirt.
characters.demeanor: Aggressive, angry, and confrontational, later shifting to impressed.

characters.appearance: Younger male, slim build, light complexion. He has short, neatly parted dark hair and is clean-shaven. His skin texture appears unnaturally smooth.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue, long-sleeved button-down shirt with a dark lanyard around his neck.
characters.demeanor: Initially defensive but calm, becoming confident and explanatory.

scenes.setting: Inside a brightly lit pharmacy, daytime. Glass counter, medicine shelves, fluorescent lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A brightly lit pharmacy interior. On the left, Character A leans aggressively over a glass counter, pointing his finger. On the right, Character B stands behind the counter, holding a piece of paper and gesturing with his hands. In the background, behind Character A, stand a few static figures, including one wearing a face mask. The counter is filled with various medicine boxes, and shelves packed with pharmaceutical products line the walls behind them. The lighting is harsh and fluorescent.

scenes.visual_description: A static wide shot of a pharmacy counter. Character A and Character B are engaged in a heated conversation, with Character A pointing aggressively and Character B responding calmly. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout the scene. The background features shelves stocked with medicines and a few motionless bystanders.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ये कौन सी दवाई दे दी है तूने? पर्चे में तो कुछ और ही लिखा है। कितनी बार समझाऊँ, तेरे दिमाग में कुछ घुसता क्यों नहीं? [What medicine have you given? Something else is written on the prescription. How many times should I explain, why doesn't anything enter your brain?]
Character A says: अगर English नहीं आती तो medical store पे काम क्यों करने चला आया गवार कहीं का चल भाग यहाँ से। [If you don't know English, why did you come to work at a medical store, you illiterate, get out of here.]
Character B says: Sir, please don't talk to me like that. This is not my mistake. It's a doctor's mistake and he is the one who wrote it incorrectly. [Sir, please don't talk to me like that. This is not my mistake. It's a doctor's mistake and he is the one who wrote it incorrectly.]
Character B says: I will give the medicine according to what is written on the prescription. And yes I am not uneducated. [I will give the medicine according to what is written on the prescription. And yes I am not uneducated.]
Character B says: I have three years of experience in pharma. Please speak respectfully from now on. [I have three years of experience in pharma. Please speak respectfully from now on.]
Character A says: अरे तुम तो अच्छी English बोलते हो, कहाँ से सीखा? [Oh, you speak good English, where did you learn it from?]
Character B says: सर, जब मैंने इस फील्ड में कदम रखा तभी पता था इंग्लिश जरुरी है। [Sir, when I stepped into this field, I knew English was important.]
Character B says: लेकिन इतना पैसा नहीं था कि कोई course join कर पाऊं। Time भी नहीं था जल्दी जॉब करके पैसा कमाना था। [But I didn't have enough money to join a course. I didn't have time either, I had to get a job quickly and earn money.]
Character B says: इसलिए मैंने सिर्फ एक रुपए से इंग्लिश सीखी। [That's why I learned English for just one rupee.]
Character A says: सिर्फ ₹1 से कैसे? [For just ₹1? How?]
Character B says: English Seekho App से एक दोस्त ने बताया था। एक रुपए का trial था सोचा एक रुपए से क्या होगा करके देखता हूँ। [From the English Seekho App, a friend told me. There was a one rupee trial, I thought what would happen with one rupee, let's try it.]
Character B says: सुबह ऑफिस से निकलने से पहले 15 मिनट। रात को लौटने के बाद Ai coach से practice. [15 minutes before leaving for the office in the morning. Practice with the AI coach after returning at night.]
Character B says: गलत बोलता था सुधार देती थी। कभी मेरा मजाक नहीं उड़ाया, कभी मुझे नीचा नहीं दिखाया। [If I spoke wrong, it would correct me. It never made fun of me, never put me down.]
Character B says: मेडिकल लाइन की English specifically सीखी पिछले 6 महीने से लगातार use कर रहा हूँ improvement आप देख ही सकते हैं। [I learned English specifically for the medical line, I have been using it continuously for the last 6 months, you can see the improvement yourself.]
Character A says: बढ़िया है यार, App का नाम क्या बताया था? [That's great man, what did you say the name of the App was?]
Character B says: English Seekho. [English Seekho.]
Character A says: मैं भी अपने बेटे के लिए download करता हूँ [I will also download it for my son.]

scenes.setting: Abstract digital background, dark purple with glowing particles.

panels.panel_visual_description: A dark purple background with glowing, floating particles. In the center, a stylized smartphone displays a solid purple screen. A glowing, neon-like vertical line with a loop at the top is centered on the phone screen. Below the phone, a white button with a cursor arrow hovering over it is visible. The lighting is dramatic and digital, with a bright flare at the bottom of the phone.

scenes.visual_description: An animated end-card sequence. A smartphone appears against a starry purple background, displaying the app's logo. A glowing light effect sweeps across the screen, and a cursor clicks an 'Install Now' button below the phone. Text overlays prompt the user to download the app.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और अभी English Seekho App डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the English Seekho App right now.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A completely solid black background with no other visual elements, characters, or props.

scenes.visual_description: A static black screen displaying a long legal disclaimer in white text. The text covers most of the screen.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
